key_insight: Performance in molecular MPNNs is primarily influenced by message construction rather than update complexity.
engineering_relevance: This research provides design heuristics for molecular MPNNs, facilitating targeted architecture assessments.
method: Decomposed 2D molecular MPNNs into three operator families: message-seed initialization, node-edge fusion, and node update.
Benchmarking conducted on ten MoleculeNet datasets with 84 configurations.
Statistical analyses to evaluate performance variation across operator configurations.
evidence_signal: The study found that representative configurations achieved competitive performance on eight of ten benchmark datasets compared to existing GNN baselines.
watch_item: The analysis does not account for all possible molecular configurations, which may limit generalizability.
paper_title: What drives performance in molecular MPNNs? An operator-level factorial benchmark
